info.description: AI-powered platform that transforms Functional Specification documents into dev-ready task breakdowns.
info.title: FS Intelligence Platform

get.description: Root endpoint — API info.
Get the global activity log — unified timeline of all audit events.

post.description: Upload a zip archive of a codebase for reverse FS generation.

get.description: List code uploads with pagination.
Get detailed info about a code upload.

post.description:
Trigger reverse FS generation from a parsed codebase.

Runs the reverse pipeline (reverse_fs_node → reverse_quality_node)
and stores the result as an FSDocument.

get.description: Get the generated FS document for a code upload.
Get the quality report for a generated FS.

post.description: Mint a Cursor task for Analyze on an existing FS document.
Mint a Cursor task for Generate FS and return its prompt.

Mint a Cursor task for Impact analysis on an uploaded FS version.

The caller must pass the *new* ``FSVersion.id``; the document's
current ``parsed_text`` is treated as the "old" FS, and the version
row's ``parsed_text`` is the "new" FS.
Mint a Cursor task for Refine on an analyzed FS document.
Mint a Cursor task for Reverse FS on a parsed CodeUpload.
Persist a Cursor-generated impact analysis against its FSVersion.
Persist a Cursor-generated refined FS as a new FSDocument.

get.description:
List non-deleted documents with pagination.

Query params: ``limit`` (1-500, default 50) and ``offset`` (default 0).

post.description: Upload a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file.

parameters.description: Optional project ID to assign document to
parameters.name: project_id

schema.description: Optional project ID to assign document to
schema.title: Project Id

delete.description: Soft-delete a document (sets status to DELETED).

get.description: Get a single document by ID, including reconstructed sections.
List all ambiguity flags for a document.

post.description: Mark all unresolved ambiguities as resolved.

patch.description: Mark an ambiguity flag as resolved, optionally with a resolution note.

post.description:
Trigger the full 11-node LangGraph analysis pipeline on a parsed document.

Pipeline order:
    parse_node → ambiguity_node → debate_node → contradiction_node →
    edge_case_node → quality_node → task_decomposition_node →
    dependency_node → traceability_node → duplicate_node → testcase_node

Passing ``?sections=1,3`` runs only the per-section nodes (ambiguity,
contradiction, edge_case, task_decomposition, traceability, duplicate,
testcase) over the specified section indices and keeps existing results
for all other sections.

Persists all results to PostgreSQL. Transitions document status
PARSED → ANALYZING → COMPLETE (or ERROR on failure).

parameters.description: Comma-separated section indices to re-analyze selectively
parameters.name: sections

schema.description: Comma-separated section indices to re-analyze selectively
schema.title: Sections

get.description: Get the current approval status and full history for a document.

post.description:
Approve an FS document.

Updates the latest PENDING approval to APPROVED.
Also adds approved sections to the requirement library.

get.description:
Get the full audit event timeline for a document.

Returns all state changes in chronological order:
UPLOADED, PARSED, ANALYZED, APPROVED, REJECTED,
VERSION_ADDED, TASKS_GENERATED, EXPORTED, COMMENT_ADDED, etc.

post.description:
Dispatch a headless Claude Code build for the given document.

Expected body:
    {
      "stack": "Next.js + FastAPI",
      "output_folder": "./output",
      "provider": "claude_code"   # optional; only claude_code is supported today
    }

Returns the ``build_state`` id so the UI can poll
``GET /{doc_id}/build-state`` for live progress.
Cancel a running analysis for a document.

get.description: List all comments for an FS document, ordered by section then date.
List all contradictions detected in a document.

post.description: Accept all unresolved contradiction resolutions, merging each into the document.
Mark all unresolved contradictions as resolved without merging text.

Accept a contradiction resolution: merge suggested_resolution into the FS
document at section A, mark resolved, create a version snapshot.

get.description:
Get all adversarial debate results for a document.

Returns debate transcripts for HIGH severity ambiguity flags
that were challenged by the Red vs Blue agent debate (L6).

List all cross-document duplicate flags for a document.

Duplicates are detected during the analysis pipeline (duplicate_node)
by searching Qdrant for cosine similarity > 0.88 across different documents.
List all edge case gaps detected in a document.

post.description: Accept all unresolved edge case suggestions, merging each into the document.
Mark all unresolved edge cases as resolved without merging text.

patch.description: Mark an edge case gap as resolved.

post.description:
Accept an edge case suggestion: merge suggested_addition into the FS
document text at the relevant section, mark the edge case as resolved,
and create a new version snapshot.
Export full FS analysis to a Confluence page.

get.description: Generate and return a Word (.docx) intelligence report.
Download the actual DOCX file.

post.description: Export FS tasks to JIRA as an epic with stories.

get.description:
Generate and return a PDF intelligence report.

Uses basic HTML-to-PDF approach since reportlab may not be installed.
Returns download metadata with the report content.
Download the actual PDF file.
Get full impact analysis for a version change.
Get rework cost estimate for a version change.

post.description:
Trigger parsing for an uploaded document.

Pipeline: parse → chunk → embed → store in Qdrant.
Updates document status: UPLOADED → PARSING → PARSED.

get.description:
Get full quality dashboard data for a document.

Returns quality score, contradictions, edge cases, and compliance tags.
Recompute quality score from current DB state without rerunning full pipeline.

post.description:
Run refinement pipeline and return refined FS candidate.

mode=auto: targeted if <= 5 issues, full otherwise.
mode=targeted: only fix affected paragraphs (fast, fewer tokens).
mode=full: rewrite entire document (thorough).

When ``llm_provider == "cursor"``, we branch to a CursorTask so the
user pastes the refine prompt into Cursor and the MCP ``submit_refine``
tool pushes the refined markdown back without burning any Direct-API
tokens.

Persist refined text as latest version. Returns immediately; the frontend
triggers re-analysis separately via the analyze endpoint so the progress
stepper works correctly.

Reject an FS document.

Updates the latest PENDING approval to REJECTED.
Admin: reset a stuck document back to PARSED (or UPLOADED if never parsed).
Add a new section to the document.

patch.description: Edit a section's heading or content in-place.

post.description: Add a comment to a specific section of an FS document.

get.description: Get the processing status of a document.

post.description:
Submit an FS document for approval review.

Document must be in COMPLETE status (analysis done) to submit.
Creates a PENDING approval record.

Suggest similar requirements from the library for a document.

Searches the fs_library collection for requirements similar to
each section in the document.

get.description: List all tasks for a document, ordered by execution order.
Get the dependency graph for a document's tasks as an adjacency list.
Get a single task by its pipeline task_id.

patch.description: Update a task (manual edit — title, description, effort, tags, criteria).

get.description: List all generated test cases for a document.
Export test cases as CSV.
Get full traceability matrix for a document.

post.description:
Upload a new version of an existing FS document.

Stores as new FSVersion row, runs parser on new version,
then triggers the impact analysis pipeline (diff → impact → rework).

When ``llm_provider == "cursor"``, the impact pipeline is skipped.
Instead we parse + persist the version and then mint a Cursor task
whose prompt asks the agent to compare the two FS markdown blobs
and submit an impact JSON via the ``submit_impact`` MCP tool. The
caller receives ``{mode: "cursor_task", ...}`` so the UI can open
the paste-per-action modal — no Direct-API tokens are burned.

get.description: List all versions for a document.
Get diff between a version and its predecessor.

post.description: Revert document text to a specific version.

get.description: Get the full text of a specific version.

post.description:
Quick mode: generate a full FS document from a product idea.

Branches on ``llm_provider``: Cursor returns a paste-per-action
task envelope; api and claude_code run the synchronous pipeline.
Guided mode: multi-step wizard for FS generation.

get.description:
Semantic search in the reusable requirement library.

Searches the fs_library Qdrant collection for requirements
similar to the query text.
Get a specific requirement from the library by its Qdrant point ID.
Map each capability to its available providers.
Get the current tool orchestration configuration.

Canonical MCP JSON snippets for Cursor and Claude Code.

A single source of truth so the in-app Build page, the docs, and the
files checked into the repo never drift. Both snippets launch the same
``mcp-server/server.py`` entry point against the backend URL specified
by settings (``BACKEND_SELF_URL``), so users can copy/paste verbatim.
List all available providers with their capabilities.

post.description: Test a specific provider's health and connectivity.

get.description: List all projects.

post.description: Create a new project.

delete.description: Delete a project. Documents are unlinked (not deleted).

get.description: Get project detail with its documents.

patch.description: Update a project's name or description.

post.description: Assign an existing document to a project.

get.description: System health check — verifies all service connections.
